name: field-textarea
visual_summary: A field-textarea is a multi-line text input component. It is used when users need to enter a longer text, such as a description or a comment. It is often used in forms or when user input is not limited to a single line of text.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: field-textarea
Description: A field-textarea is a multi-line text input component. It is used when users need to enter a longer text, such as a description or a comment. It is often used in forms or when user input is not limited to a single line of text.
Style: e.g. minimal, flat, responsive
Interactions: e.g. readonly, disabled, focusable
Tags: form control, input field, textarea

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
